sentences.arabic: يَحْمِلُ عِصَامٌ مَعَهُ وَجْبَةً خَفِيفَةً صِحِّيَّةً إِلَى الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Isam nosi sa sobom zdrave grickalice na posao.
sentences.translationEn: Issam carries a healthy snack with him to work.

sentences.translation: Jede orašaste plodove i voće između obroka.
sentences.translationEn: He eats nuts and fruit between meals.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَشْتَرِي أَكْلًا مِنَ الشَّارِعِ لِأَنَّهُ غَيْرُ صِحِّيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Ne kupuje hranu s ulice jer nije zdrava.
sentences.translationEn: He does not buy food from the street because it is unhealthy.

sentences.arabic: صَارَ زَمَلَاؤُهُ يَسْأَلُونَهُ عَنْ وَصَفَاتِ الْأَكْلِ الصِّحِّيِّ.
sentences.translation: Kolege su ga počeli pitati za recepte zdrave hrane.
sentences.translationEn: His colleagues started asking him for healthy food recipes.
